name: npm-publish-safety
description: Guard npm publish, unpublish, deprecate, and access changes
author: sieteunoseis

hooks.name: Block npm unpublish
hooks.description: Prevents npm unpublish which removes packages from the registry

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^npm unpublish'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: npm unpublish removes packages from the registry. This can break downstream consumers."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block npm deprecate
hooks.description: Prevents npm deprecate which marks packages as deprecated for all users

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^npm deprecate'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: npm deprecate affects all consumers of this package. Get explicit user approval."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block npm access changes
hooks.description: Prevents npm access which modifies package permissions and visibility

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^npm access (set|grant|revoke)'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: npm access modifies package permissions. Get explicit user approval."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block npm owner changes
hooks.description: Prevents npm owner add/rm which changes package ownership

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^npm owner (add|rm) '; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: npm owner changes affect package ownership. Get explicit user approval."}'; fi; }
